General.Name: China Southern Airlines Co Ltd
General.Description: China Southern Airlines Company Limited offers airline transportation services in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, Macau, Taiwan, and internationally. The company offers cargo, mail and luggage transportation services; providing aircraft maintenance services; operating agency business for domestic and foreign airlines; providing airline catering services; aviation ground extension business; civil aircraft type training; asset leasing; engineering management and technical consulting; aviation material sales; travel agency services; commodity retail and wholesale; health examination services; internet sales; concurrent insurance agency business; domestic trade agency; professional design service; the first type of value-added telecommunications business; telecommunications business; advertising production; advertising release; advertising design, agency; internet data service; internet information service; information system, integration services; internet of things technology services; socio-economic consulting services; information technology consulting services; information consulting services; and import and export agent services, as well as hotel management and tour services. The company was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China. China Southern Airlines Company Limited operates as a subsidiary of China Southern Air Holding Company Limited.
General.Address: Unit 301, Phase I Office Building, Guanhao Technology Park, Guangzhou, China
